Apple___Apple_scab.symptoms: Dark olive-green spots on leaves and fruits
Apple___Apple_scab.prevention: Remove fallen leaves and improve air circulation

Apple___Black_rot.symptoms: Brown rotten spots on fruits and leaf lesions
Apple___Black_rot.prevention: Remove mummified fruits and infected branches

Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.prevention: Avoid nearby cedar trees and prune infected leaves

Apple___healthy.prevention: Maintain regular watering and balanced fertilization

Blueberry___healthy.prevention: Ensure proper soil acidity and watering

Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.prevention: Improve airflow and avoid excess humidity

Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.prevention: Avoid dense planting and remove crop residue

Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.prevention: Practice crop rotation and field sanitation

Grape___Black_rot.symptoms: Dark circular lesions on leaves and fruits
Grape___Black_rot.prevention: Prune infected vines and remove fallen fruits

Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).symptoms: Dark streaks on leaves and berries
Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).prevention: Avoid pruning wounds during wet weather

Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.symptoms: Brown spots with yellow margins on leaves
Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.prevention: Improve air circulation and remove infected leaves

Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).symptoms: Yellow shoots, misshapen fruits, bitter taste
Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).prevention: Control psyllid insects and use disease-free seedlings

Peach___Bacterial_spot.symptoms: Dark spots on leaves and fruits
Peach___Bacterial_spot.prevention: Avoid overhead watering and improve air circulation

Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.symptoms: Water-soaked spots on leaves and fruits
Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.prevention: Use disease-free seeds and avoid wet foliage

Pepper,_bell___healthy.prevention: Provide proper watering and nutrient balance

Potato___Early_blight.prevention: Rotate crops and remove infected debris

Potato___Late_blight.symptoms: Dark water-soaked lesions on leaves and stems
Potato___Late_blight.prevention: Avoid overhead watering and ensure proper spacing

Potato___healthy.prevention: Maintain healthy soil and proper watering

Squash___Powdery_mildew.prevention: Improve air circulation and avoid overcrowding

Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.symptoms: Purple or brown leaf edges and spots
Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.prevention: Avoid overhead watering and improve airflow

Strawberry___healthy.prevention: Use clean mulch and proper irrigation

Tomato___Bacterial_spot.symptoms: Small dark lesions on leaves and fruits
Tomato___Bacterial_spot.prevention: Use disease-free seeds and avoid wet foliage

Tomato___Early_blight.symptoms: Brown spots with concentric rings on leaves
Tomato___Early_blight.prevention: Rotate crops and remove infected leaves

Tomato___Late_blight.symptoms: Dark brown lesions on leaves and stems
Tomato___Late_blight.prevention: Avoid overhead watering and improve air circulation

Tomato___Leaf_Mold.symptoms: Yellow patches and mold under leaves

Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.symptoms: Small circular spots with gray centers
Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.prevention: Avoid wet foliage and practice crop rotation

Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider.prevention: Maintain humidity and inspect plants regularly
